overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The character walks along construction-lined sidewalks, peers into a fenced industrial courtyard, runs through commercial districts, and crosses busy intersections with futuristic vehicle traffic beneath towering overpasses and holographic billboards.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a white construction barrier with red panels

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: temporary construction wall with white panels and red horizontal stripes
green painted metal railing separating sidewalk from street
tall building covered with multiple illuminated digital advertisements and neon signage
tall street light with dual lamps on the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city sidewalk at night, bordered by a white construction barrier on the right and a green metal railing separating the pedestrian path from the street on the left. Neon billboards illuminate the distant buildings while a pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced industrial courtyard with purple lighting

events.description: character turns right to look over metal fence into lower industrial courtyard
character turns back to face forward along the main street

agents.ego_description: pausing to look over the fence at the industrial area below with purple neon lighting

entered.detail: tall metal security fence with vertical bars overlooking a lower level
lower concrete courtyard with industrial equipment and purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character turns to peer over a metal fence into a sunken industrial courtyard illuminated by purple neon light. The area contains concrete platforms and utility structures. After observing, the character turns back to continue along the main path.

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running forward along the sidewalk past benches and planters, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk before being passed by the running character

entered.detail: wooden and metal public bench on the right side of the walkway
rectangular planter box with trimmed green hedges
ornate street lamp with glowing light fixture

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main sidewalk, the character walks past commercial buildings with large neon billboards, then breaks into a run. The path features public benches and planter boxes on the right, with street lamps illuminating the left side as the character overtakes a pedestrian ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with wet reflective streets

events.description: character crosses street between moving futuristic vehicles including a blue sedan and silver sports car
character enters covered area beneath elevated overpass structure

agents.ego_description: running across the wet intersection, weaving through heavy traffic of futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue futuristic sedan driving past the crosswalk
silver sports car speeding through the intersection

entered.detail: elevated transit bridge with colorful green and orange structural elements and neon lighting
large digital billboard displaying 'PURE OVERKILL' text with racing track graphic
tall traffic signal pole with red lights illuminated

segments.scene_description: The character runs across a wide, wet intersection reflecting the neon lights from surrounding billboards. Heavy futuristic traffic passes by in both directions beneath a colorful elevated overpass. The character navigates between vehicles including a blue sedan and silver sports car before reaching the covered area under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway under elevated transit line

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass, continuing through the urban canyon

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure overhead with exposed beams and fluorescent lighting
metal escalator structure leading up to the elevated transit platform
cluster of purple and white neon signs on buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: Now beneath the concrete overpass, the character walks through a sheltered urban corridor with the transit structure overhead. The area features support pillars, a metal escalator on the right, and continues to show wet reflective streets with moderate vehicle traffic passing by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a restricted construction zone into a bustling, rain-slicked transit hub. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk bordered by white construction barriers and green railings under the glow of distant billboards. As the character pauses to peer over a metal fence into a sunken industrial courtyard bathed in purple neon, the perspective then shifts back to the main path, where the pace quickens into a run past commercial buildings and public benches. The scene then opens up as the character sprints across a wide, wet intersection reflecting vibrant lights, weaving through futuristic traffic beneath a colorful elevated overpass. Finally, the camera moves into the sheltered concrete space under the overpass, passing support pillars and a metal escalator while continuing along the reflective streets.
